question: How do I access Canvas?
final_answer: To access Canvas, go to the URL `https://canvas.jhu.edu` and log in with your JHED ID and password. Two-factor authentication (DUO) is required for login. If you're having trouble logging in, confirm that your JHED account is active at `https://my.jhu.edu`.
